clause_text: The Tenant shall pay a refundable security deposit equal to two (2) months' rent.
The Tenant shall pay a refundable security deposit equal to five (5) months' rent.
The Tenant shall pay a security deposit equal to ten (10) months' rent. Non-refundable if vacating before 24 months.
Either party may terminate this agreement by giving 30 days' written notice.
The Tenant must give 60 days' written notice; Landlord may terminate with 15 days' notice.
The Tenant must give 90 days' written notice. The Landlord may terminate immediately without notice.
There shall be a lock-in period of 6 months, terminable by mutual consent in emergencies.
There shall be a lock-in period of 11 months; full remaining rent due if vacated early.
There shall be a lock-in period of 24 months; forfeiture of deposit plus 3 months penalty if vacated early.
Monthly rent shall be increased by 5% annually with 60 days notice.
Landlord reserves the right to increase rent at their discretion during lock-in with 15 days notice.
Landlord may increase rent by any amount at any time without prior notice.
Landlord responsible for painting before move-in; no charges unless tenant causes damage.
One month's rent deducted for painting regardless of wall condition.
Two months' rent deducted unconditionally for painting even if tenant repaints themselves.
Landlord bears structural repairs; tenant bears minor day-to-day maintenance.
Tenant bears all maintenance costs including structural repairs during tenancy.
Tenant bears full responsibility for all repairs including structural damage regardless of cause.
Either party may terminate per notice period; no penalty after lock-in ends.
Landlord may terminate at any time without cause given 15 days notice.
Landlord may enter and repossess without court process if rent delayed by even one day.
